hero.title: Full Stack Developer
hero.subtitle: Scalable Systems. Clean Architecture. Measurable Results.
hero.description:
Hi, I'm Saúl Puentes — a Software Engineer with 7 years of experience in full-stack web development. I'm an expert in JavaScript and have a proven track record of building scalable and customizable applications across e-commerce, logistics, and SaaS.

My work includes leading the development of a logistics platform, designing inventory systems with Shopify, implementing dynamic UI features, integrating headless CMS solutions, and building multilingual, mobile-ready applications. I've worked extensively with React, Next.js, NestJS, and Node.js, along with Docker, AWS, and various SQL/NoSQL databases.

Comfortable working in remote, multicultural environments. I follow Agile/Scrum methodologies.

content: Software Engineer with 7 years of experience in full-stack web development, specializing in JavaScript and modern frameworks like React, Next.js, NestJS, and Node.js.

Proven track record building scalable applications for e-commerce, logistics, and SaaS. Experience includes headless CMS integration, Shopify inventory systems, and multilingual mobile-ready applications.
Background in e-commerce, IT consulting, and real estate. Comfortable in remote, multicultural environments. Agile/Scrum methodologies.

planning.title: Strategy & Architecture
planning.description: I help translate business goals into a clear technical foundation: scope definition, architecture, workflows, and stack decisions for SaaS products, logistics platforms, and e-commerce experiences.

development.title: Full-Stack Development
development.description: I build scalable web applications with React, Next.js, NestJS, and Node.js, from dashboards and internal platforms to multilingual websites and mobile-ready experiences.

analysis.title: E-commerce, CMS & Automation
analysis.description: I design solutions that reduce manual work and improve operations: Shopify integrations, headless CMS workflows, process automation, and content structures that are easier to maintain.

consulting.title: Technical Consulting & Audit
consulting.description: I review existing products to uncover bottlenecks in performance, maintainability, and scalability, then propose concrete improvements focused on measurable outcomes and realistic execution.

contact.description: Interested in working together? I look forward to hearing from you.
